title: CyberArk PAM zero-day is actively exploited in the wild
rssSummary: Customers are urged to apply an emergency patch for privileged access deployments.
humanReason: Active exploitation and zero-day language affecting monitored CyberArk PAM.

title: CISA adds CVE-2026-12345 to Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog
rssSummary: Federal agencies must remediate the known exploited vulnerability by the required due date.
humanReason: CISA KEV and CVE indicate urgent operational signal.

title: Ransomware group claims data breach at enterprise supplier
rssSummary: The attackers say customer records were stolen and leaked online.
humanReason: Ransomware and data breach signals are urgent even before extraction.

title: Microsoft Patch Tuesday fixes Windows Server security vulnerabilities
rssSummary: Microsoft released security updates for multiple Windows Server flaws.
humanReason: Vendor patch release for monitored Windows Server product.

title: Researchers publish proof-of-concept exploit for identity platform vulnerability
rssSummary: The flaw may allow authentication bypass in enterprise identity systems.
humanReason: Exploit PoC and vulnerability analysis should pass extraction.

title: Security advisory for SailPoint IdentityIQ privilege escalation vulnerability
rssSummary: Administrators should update affected IdentityIQ deployments.
humanReason: Official vendor advisory for monitored SailPoint IdentityIQ product.

title: Enterprise cloud security risk report released
rssSummary: The report discusses identity, admin access, cloud exposure, and hardening patterns.
humanReason: Weak security relevance with no clear vendor or CVE; useful for cost tuning.

title: Cloudflare announces product launch for enterprise customers
rssSummary: The feature release includes dashboard updates and a marketing campaign.
humanReason: Monitored vendor mention with product launch and no security context.

title: Vendor accused of breach of contract after acquisition talks
rssSummary: The dispute concerns partnership terms and market growth plans.
humanReason: Business/legal use of breach should not pass as cyber threat signal.

title: New AI feature release promises productivity gains
rssSummary: The product review covers pricing, hiring plans, and customer stories.
humanReason: Generic product news unrelated to cyber threat monitoring.
